productDisplayName: Baggit Women Kungfu Baby Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 12 cm x 14 cm Created from genuine leather and synthetic overlays Synthetic shoulder strap Foldable flap style zippered compartment Wallet mounted onto the other side with a press button closure One main compartment with two folds A pocket, a card holder slot and a photo id slot on the left fold One pocket and three card holder slots on the right A zippered compartment on top Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
